key_changes: Replaced manual file I/O (~/.tv_scalp_state.json) with StateManager abstraction
Replaced load_state() direct file reading with state_manager.get_watch_state('XAUUSD')
Replaced save_state() direct file writing with state_manager.save_watch_state('XAUUSD', ...)
file_insights.impact: Centralizes state persistence logic, improves testability, reduces boilerplate

patterns_discovered.description: Migrating from ad-hoc file-based state to structured state management layer
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables centralized state persistence logic, versioning, and easier testing

patterns_discovered.description: StateManager instantiated with namespace='scalp_scan' to isolate state by component
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents state key collisions across different modules/systems

patterns_discovered.description: State keyed by instrument ('XAUUSD') rather than generic 'key' parameter
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables multi-symbol support without code changes, better modularity

gotchas_discovered.description: Original try/except blocks removed; error handling now delegated to StateManager
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Assumes StateManager handles exceptions appropriately; caller should verify

gotchas_discovered.description: Shifted from flat 'key' field to nested watch-state dictionary with 'key' inside
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: StateManager must properly handle empty state ({}) vs populated state ({'key': k})

approach_outcome.description: Successfully replaced file-based state management with StateManager abstraction in single attempt

recommendations: Verify StateManager.get_watch_state() returns None when no state exists (handles None check)
Add unit tests for edge cases: missing state, empty state dict, and save/load cycles
Document StateManager API contract, especially around None vs {} semantics
Consider extracting 'XAUUSD' to a constant to enable multi-symbol support more cleanly
